definition: ability to recover from a failure, without corrective maintenance

definition_ml.en: ability to recover from a failure, without corrective maintenance

note:
Note 1 The ability to recover may or may not require external actions. For recovery where no external actions are required, see self-recoverability (IEV 192-01-26). 

Note 2 Recoverability may be quantified using measures such as the probability of recovery within a specified time interval.
